evidence.observed: High tool_error_rate causing tools to fail with error status

findings.root_cause: High tool_error_rate in config makes tools fail frequently with status error.
findings.suggested_fix: Set a retry policy with backoff in config.json to gracefully handle transient tool failures.

evidence.observed: Catalog override contradicts stock for Macbook, and lack of diacritic normalization fails to serve cities

findings.root_cause: Catalog override is contradicting stock for Macbook, and lack of diacritic normalization fails to serve cities.
findings.suggested_fix: Clear catalog_override in config.json and enable normalize_unicode.

evidence.observed: P95 and P99 tail latency spikes without caching

findings.root_cause: Tail latency spike at p95 and p99 due to model price tier overhead and disabled cache.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable cache in config.json and reduce context_size.

evidence.observed: Repeated tool calls exceeding max_steps due to lack of loop guard

findings.root_cause: Agent gets stuck in a repeated loop exceeding max_steps due to lack of loop guard.
findings.suggested_fix: Set loop_guard=true and max_steps=6 in config.json.

evidence.observed: High cost and token usage from premium model tier and large context size storing excessive prompt_tokens

findings.root_cause: High cost and token usage due to premium model tier and large context size storing excessive prompt_tokens.
findings.suggested_fix: Set context_size=4 and verbose_system=false in config.json.

evidence.observed: Quality drift over multiple turns due to high temperature causing inconsistent responses

findings.root_cause: Quality drift over multiple turns due to high temperature causing inconsistent responses.

evidence.observed: Leaking customer email and phone because redact_pii is disabled

findings.root_cause: PII leak of customer email and phone because redact_pii is disabled in config.
findings.suggested_fix: Set redact_pii=true in config.json and instruct agent in prompt.txt not to output email/phone.

evidence.observed: Fabrication of prices instead of grounding and refusing out of stock items

findings.root_cause: Fabrication and hallucination of prices instead of grounding and refusing out of stock items.
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct agent in prompt.txt to refuse order when item is out of stock.

evidence.observed: Arithmetic errors in math calculations of discount and total calculation

findings.root_cause: Arithmetic errors in math calculations of discount and total calculation.
findings.suggested_fix: Instruct agent in prompt.txt to perform exact step-by-step arithmetic.

evidence.observed: Calling redundant tool steps because tool_budget is not set or over

findings.root_cause: Tool overuse calling redundant tool steps because tool_budget is not set or over.
findings.suggested_fix: Configure tool_budget=4 in config.json and instruct agent to call each tool at most once.
